meta.title: vngoweb — Website Builder for Small Businesses
meta.description: vngoweb helps cafes, restaurants, spas and small businesses build a professional website in minutes — pick a template, customize, publish. No coding required.

hero.badge: The fast, simple solution for cafes and restaurants
hero.description: No coding needed. Just paste your Google Maps link and vngoweb automatically builds a beautiful, mobile-optimized website that's ready to win customers.
hero.imageAlt: Cafe owner with a professional QR code

showcase.description: These are real screenshots of website templates available on vngoweb — hover over the center template to scroll through the full page.

features.description: Powerful yet remarkably easy-to-use tools, designed for busy business owners.

maps.title: Automated from Google Maps
maps.description: Paste a link and instantly get a website with your reviews, photos and contact details synced automatically. Not a single word to retype.

multilang.title: Smart multilingual menus
multilang.description: The system detects each visitor's language and switches seamlessly — a sure way to impress international guests.

qr.title: Dynamic, branded QR codes
qr.description: Create table QR codes with your logo. Print once, then update your menu and prices forever in the system — no reprinting needed.

howItWorks.description: We handle every complex technical step, leaving all the room for your creativity.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create an account in seconds with your Google account.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Paste a Google Maps link and let AI build your page, or pick a template and fine-tune it your way.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Hit publish, get your QR code and start welcoming new customers right away.

cta.title: Ready to make your business look professional?
cta.description: Start building your professional online presence today. Try all the core features for free.
